html:
Exclusive to:

Watch Towers are a structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC that can be found in the Pig City and Pig City Outskirts biome. When damaged with a Hammer and reduced to rubble, a Royal Guard will spawn to protect the tower. Watch towers will be repaired by Worker pigs if they have been damaged. Watch Towers can be built by the player if they are holding a Key to the City. They cannot be set on fire. Royal Guard respawns after 3 days if killed.

Tips

  • If one wants Royal Guards around in a vanilla Don't Starve or Reign Of Giants world, at least one Halberd should be brought through the Skyworthy alongside the Key to the City. Further Halberds can be obtained by spawning and killing Royal Guards or buying them from The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop.

Gallery

  • Watch Tower without flags
  • Watch Tower during Pig Fiesta
  • Watch Tower Broken
  • Unused Watch Tower Burnt Model
  • Unused Watch Tower Rundown Model
  • Unused Watch Tower Rundown and Burnt Model
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Watch Towers are a structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC that can be found in the Pig City and Pig City Outskirts biome. When damaged with a Hammer and reduced to rubble, a Royal Guard will spawn to protect the tower. Watch towers will be repaired by Worker pigs if they have been damaged. Watch Towers can be built by the player if they are holding a Key to the City. They cannot be set on fire. Royal Guard respawns after 3 days if killed.
Tips[edit | edit source]
If one wants Royal Guards around in a vanilla Don't Starve or Reign Of Giants world, at least one Halberd should be brought through the Skyworthy alongside the Key to the City. Further Halberds can be obtained by spawning and killing Royal Guards or buying them from The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Tháp canh là một công trình dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC có thể được tìm thấy trong quần xã Thành phố Lợn và Vùng ngoại ô Thành phố Lợn. Khi bị Búa phá hủy và biến thành đống đổ nát, Vệ binh Hoàng gia sẽ xuất hiện để bảo vệ tòa tháp. Tháp canh sẽ được lợn Thợ sửa chữa nếu chúng bị hư hỏng. Người chơi có thể xây dựng Tháp Canh nếu họ đang nắm giữ Chìa khóa Thành phố. Chúng không thể bị đốt cháy. Vệ Binh Hoàng Gia sẽ hồi sinh sau 3 ngày nếu bị giết.

'''Watch Towers''' are a [[structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC that can be found in the [[Pig City]] and Pig City Outskirts [[Biomes|biome]]. When damaged with a [[Hammer]] and reduced to rubble, a [[Royal Guard]] will spawn to protect the tower. Watch towers will be repaired by [[Worker]] pigs if they have been damaged. Watch Towers can be built by the player if they are holding a [[Key to the City]]. They cannot be set on fire. Royal Guard respawns after 3 [[Day|days]] if killed.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}}Tips ==
*If one wants Royal Guards around in a vanilla ''Don't Starve'' or ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign Of Giants]]'' world, at least one Halberd should be brought through the [[Skyworthy]] alongside the Key to the City. Further Halberds can be obtained by spawning and killing Royal Guards or buying them from [[The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop]].
